description:
A Modern Redis Desktop Manager

Tiny RDM is a modern lightweight cross-platform Redis desktop manager available for Mac, Windows, and Linux.
The first release of Redisee, a complete rewrite of Tiny RDM, is now available. If you’re looking for a better experience and new features for Redis management and editing, feel free to give it a try: https://redisee.com
Tiny RDM 的重写版本 Redisee 首个版本已经发布，希望对 Redis 管理编辑工具有更好体验和新特性的，欢迎前往尝鲜 : https://redisee.com
